analysis.consistency: High. The mechanical effects align with the descriptive flavor (pure good, damage to evil/neutral, bonus for good clerics/paladins). The destruction condition upon losing the last charge is consistent.
analysis.quality: High. The item is clearly defined, powerful (Legendary), and presents significant risk/reward, especially due to the immediate destruction effect tied to the final charge.

mechanics.damage_on_hold_per_turn: Evil creature takes damage again each time it ends its turn holding/carrying.

benefits: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls while worn or held

effect.description: Flaming fissure opens under target creature within 120 feet.

save.failure_effect: Target falls into fissure and is destroyed, leaving no remains. Fissure closes without a trace.

charges.destruction_trigger: Expending the last charge causes the talisman to disperse and be destroyed.
